title: The internationalisation of education and ‘Belt and Road’ student mobilities in Southeast Asia
abstract: in Asia, influenced by deepening China-ASEAN trade ties and educational migrations. The papers in this collection outline the historical connections and affinities that underpin educational exchanges and migrations between China and Southeast Asia. They provide an overview of major trends in student migrations that link each Southeast Asian country with China. The papers also discuss key drivers and issues underpinning the educational migration of Chinese youths to Southeast Asia in the overall context of China’s BRI. In doing so, the collection foregrounds three important themes that help shed light on the complex interplay of historical, geopolitical, and economic factors shaping student mobility and educational linkages in Southeast Asia
authors_text: Lee, Kris Hyesoo; Cheng, Yi’En; Yeoh, Brenda; Ho, Kong Chong
